calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Pro Tem Russell Davis, clerk-beth wilber, dept. 506: Plaintiff Martin Dominquez appears in Pro Per. He is assisted by Maria Guerrero who serves as an informal interpreter for Spanish. Defendant, Sahar Nouno appears in Pro Per for Alexandria Cafe. No evidence was retained. Not reported.
